LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SANDI W. MA AND LIAN NG'S AMENDED DEMURRER (TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT). ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO THE 1ST, 4TH, 5TH AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION (INTENTIONAL INTERFERENCE) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE THAT DEFENDANTS HAD KNOWLEDGE OF PLAINTIFF'S RELATIONSHIP WITH THE PRIOR OWNER (FORMER LANDLORD) AND INTENDED TO DISRUPT THAT RELATIONSHIP. (MOVING PARTY MAY PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: CARLITO MANDIA, CSR 	689

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2011 Off Calendar

AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-02-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS SANDI W. MA AND LIAN NG'S AMENDED DEMURRER (TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT).

APPEARANCES: Michael W. Knapp, Esq. of Bradley Arant Boult Cummings LLP 704/338-6004 for pltf & opposing party; S. Clinton Woods, Esq. of Bradshaw & Associates, P.C. 433-4800 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO THE 1ST, 4TH, 5TH AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION (INTENTIONAL INTERFERENCE) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE THAT DEFENDANTS HAD KNOWLEDGE OF PLAINTIFF'S RELATIONSHIP WITH THE PRIOR OWNER (FORMER LANDLORD) AND INTENDED TO DISRUPT THAT RELATIONSHIP. (Moving party may prepare a proposed form of order.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Carlito Mandia, CSR 689

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. DEFENDANTS SANDI MA, LIAN NG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to June 2, 2011 per amended notice. (302/LMG) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
